title: Customizable Ore Quantity
description: A mod that adds a config to tweak the base drop rates of vanilla minecraft ores. For example, you can tweak the pre-fortune modified drop of iron ore from 1 to a range between 1-3 or 3-4 or whatever. Server side only.
body:
A mod that adds a config to tweak the base drop rates of vanilla minecraft ores. For example, you can tweak the pre-fortune modified drop of iron ore from 1 to a range between 1-3 or 3-4 or whatever.

Server side only. Works for single player. 

Use the [GitHub](https://github.com/Mars0ni/Minecraft-CustomizableOreQuantity) for feature requests/issues.
